hero.subtitle: Upload your likeness, mint an on-chain identity, issue a token. Fans invest by buying in. Hold tokens to unlock AI drama licensing rights. Every performance earns dividends for all holders.
explore.title: Explore Idols
explore.subtitle: Discover AI virtual stars powered by bonding curves on Injective.
create.title: Create Idol
create.subtitle: Upload a face, mint an on-chain identity, and launch a bonding curve token.
create.upload.title: Avatar / Likeness *
create.upload.hint: Drag and drop or click to upload
create.upload.formats: AI-generated or real photo. PNG/JPG. Max 10MB.
create.upload.note: This will be stored on IPFS and written to your ERC-8004 on-chain identity. This likeness becomes a tradeable asset for AI drama casting.
create.name: Name *
create.licensing.title: Likeness Rights
create.licensing.desc: Holding tokens grants usage rights: 10% = community use, 20% = commercial AI dramas, 50% = exclusive rights. Revenue flows to Treasury, all holders earn dividends.
detail.licensing.title: Likeness Licensing
detail.licensing.subtitle: Auto-granted based on holding %
detail.licensing.standard.desc: Use likeness in AI short films, variety shows
detail.licensing.exclusive.desc: Sole commercial rights for a fixed period
detail.licensing.request.desc: Get an on-chain permit for AI content production
detail.licensing.granted.desc: You can now use this idol's likeness for AI content production. Revenue should be sent to the Treasury contract.
detail.licensing.revenue.desc: Flows to Treasury, all holders earn
detail.licensing.revoke.desc: Auto-revokes if holdings drop below tier
agent.title: Agent Dashboard
agent.subtitle: Real-time view of autonomous decision-making.
